title: teardown routine report "panic: runtime error: slice bounds out of range"
body:
/kind bug

**Description**
Podman run or podman rm sometimes report "panic: runtime error: slice bounds out of range" when it try to do clean up and del CNI network. But the command line still can finished with status 0.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Run ls with alpine 
# podman --log-level debug run docker.io/library/alpine:latest ls


**Describe the results you received:**
Error msg reported with stack trace

**Describe the results you expected:**
No error msg or stack trace shows up

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Details of the command line output:


comments.body: Known issue. There is a bug against iptables-go to fix this.

Hi @mheon 
After update the cni plugins and podman update date. The podman run will not panic now. But it still report error message:

```
ERRO[0000] Error deleting network: running [/usr/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.0 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff
 
ERRO[0000] Error while removing pod from CNI network "podman": running [/usr/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.0 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff
 
ERRO[0000] unable to cleanup network for container 785b9e1086436c28927d1850a60bd31dac9b8274f8049c8e0b05775f94cb70db: "error tearing down CNI namespace configuration for container 785b9e1086436c28927d1850a60bd31dac9b8274f8049c8e0b05775f94cb70db: running [/usr/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.0 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff\n"
```

So seems there are still problem. Is there any other package I need update for test this? Or we still need some update in podman?

We're waiting on a update to iptables to fix the last few issues. Podman
itself should require no changes.

On Wed, Aug 29, 2018, 05:43 Yiqiao Pu <notifications@github.com> wrote:

> Hi @mheon <https://github.com/mheon>
> After update the cni plugins and podman update date. The podman run will
> not panic now. But it still report error message:
>
> ERRO[0000] Error deleting network: running [/usr/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.0 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff
>
> ERRO[0000] Error while removing pod from CNI network "podman": running [/usr/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.0 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff
>
> ERRO[0000] unable to cleanup network for container 785b9e1086436c28927d1850a60bd31dac9b8274f8049c8e0b05775f94cb70db: "error tearing down CNI namespace configuration for container 785b9e1086436c28927d1850a60bd31dac9b8274f8049c8e0b05775f94cb70db: running [/usr/sbin/iptables -t nat -X CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff --wait]: exit status 4: iptables v1.8.0 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_USER_DEL failed (Device or resource busy): chain CNI-84e70bf16de400e0b9fff0ff\n"
>
> So seems there are still problem. Is there any other package I need update
> for test this? Or we still need some update in podman?
>
> —
> You are receiving this because you were mentioned.
